info.title: Extended Problem Detail Boot 3 WebMVC Example API
info.description: Example Spring Boot 3 WebMVC endpoints that demonstrate Extended Problem Detail responses.

tags.name: WebMVC Example
tags.description: Endpoints that intentionally trigger different MVC and validation exceptions.

put.description: Real trigger from tests: PUT multipart/form-data /mvc-extended-problem-detail/missing-servlet-request-part-exception without file part. For the exact request setup and assertions, see src/test/java/io/github/sbracely/extended/problem/detail/webmvc/example/controller/MvcControllerTests.java.

get.description: Real trigger from tests: GET /mvc-extended-problem-detail/async-request-timeout-exception and let async processing time out. For the exact request setup and assertions, see src/test/java/io/github/sbracely/extended/problem/detail/webmvc/example/controller/MvcControllerTests.java.

503.description: 503 async timeout error. See the MVC example tests for concrete triggering inputs.

get.description: Normal client-visible response is 200 text/event-stream. AsyncRequestNotUsableException happens only after the client disconnects or times out while the server is still writing, so it is not observable as a stable application/problem+json body. For the disconnect trigger and server-side behaviour, see src/test/java/io/github/sbracely/extended/problem/detail/webmvc/example/open/api/MvcOpenApiRandomPortContractTests.java.

200.description: 200 server-sent events stream. Normal client-visible behavior is an SSE stream; AsyncRequestNotUsableException is only triggered after the client disconnects while the server is still writing.

delete.description: Real trigger from tests: DELETE /mvc-extended-problem-detail/missing-path-variable-exception. For the exact request setup and assertions, see src/test/java/io/github/sbracely/extended/problem/detail/webmvc/example/controller/MvcControllerTests.java.

MvcProblemDetailRequest.description: Sample request payload used by the example endpoints.

name.description: User name used by validation examples.

age.description: User age used by validation examples.

password.description: Password used by custom validation examples.

confirmPassword.description: Repeated password used by custom validation examples.

Error.description: Detailed error entry inside the Extended Problem Detail response.

target.description: Field, parameter, cookie, header, or business target associated with the error.

ExtendedProblemDetail.description: RFC 9457 problem detail extended with an errors array.

errors.message: Password and confirm password do not match
Password and confirm password do not match
